stemHtml: In which of the followings situations is Ice Crystal Icing most likely to occur?

options.a: Flying below the freezing level at low temperatures (OAT < ISA) inside thick layers of ST clouds.
options.b: Flying at high altitude at high temperatures (OAT > ISA) in the vicinity of cirrus streaks on top of CB clouds.
options.d: Flying higher than the freezing level at high temperatures (OAT > ISA) inside strongly developed CB clouds.
